headline: Coinbase Backs $1B ProShares Stablecoin ETF Launch

article.title: Coinbase invests in ProShares ETF tailored for stablecoin reserve assets
article.summary: The exchange has invested an undisclosed amount in ProShares’ Treasury-focused ETF built for the post-GENIUS era as lawmakers debate whether stablecoin issuers can offer yield-bearing products.

headline: Bitcoin Surges Toward $224K Amid Sovereign Debt Crisis

article.title: Bitcoin’s $224K ‘fair value’ may emerge if sovereign debt fears deepen: Bitwise
article.summary: A sovereign default-risk model estimates Bitcoin’s fair value at $224,000, as rising debt risks and bond-market stress could strengthen the asset’s long-term investment case.

headline: Zitron: Block $10B Anthropic, OpenAI IPO Plans Immediately

article.title: Anthopic, OpenAI Should Not Be Allowed to IPO, Says Ed Zitron
article.summary: Ed Zitron, CEO at EZ Primary Research, said that the risk of balancing the equity market on record public offerings for AI companies that have never reported profit is a dangerous proposition and that those companies should not be allowed to IPO. article.title: Bitcoin’s Inflation-Hedging Promise in Tatters After Plunge
article.summary: Bitcoin has fallen 36% over the past year and slipped below $70,000 this week, extending a retreat that is undermining several of the arguments that helped carry the cryptocurrency into the financial mainstream.

headline: BTC Plunges as $56B Giant Offloads Holdings

article.summary: Shares in the leading Bitcoin treasury firm Strategy (MSTR) are now more than 70% off their 52-week high after the company sold BTC.
